response:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "ParseCommand",
      "purpose": "Validate and parse the command string to determine the operation to execute",
      "behavior": "Check command is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'; return parsed command type",
      "inputs": ["command"],
      "outputs": ["command_type"],
      "signature": "def ParseCommand(command: str) -> str",
      "global_vars": [],
      "data_operations": [],
      "requested_capabilities": [],
      "constraints": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": [],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "ValidateOrderData",
      "purpose": "Validate order_data structure and required fields based on command type",
      "behavior": "Check required fields exist and have correct types; for 'place' ensure items list non-empty; for 'cancel' and 'track' ensure order_id present",
      "inputs": ["command_type", "order_data"],
      "outputs": ["validated_data"],
      "signature": "def ValidateOrderData(command_type: str, order_data: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [],
      "data_operations": [],
      "requested_capabilities": [],
      "constraints": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": [],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "PlaceOrder",
      "purpose": "Execute the 'place' order workflow: validate inventory, charge payment, reserve stock, create order, send notification",
      "behavior": "Check item availability and stock, charge payment via payment gateway, reserve inventory, create order record, send confirmation notification; rollback on failure",
      "inputs": ["validated_data", "orders", "inventory"],
      "outputs": ["order_result"],
      "signature": "def PlaceOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database, inventory: Database) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read_write", "description": "Create order record, read existing orders for conflict check"},
        {"variable": "inventory", "op": "read_write", "description": "Read stock levels, write reserved_count and stock_count"},
        {"variable": "payments", "op": "read_write", "description": "Create payment record, read payment status"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "orders", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Create new order record, read existing orders"},
        {"source_name": "inventory", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Read stock, decrement stock, increment reserved"},
        {"source_name": "payments", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Create payment record, read payment status"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["database.read_write", "payment.charge"],
      "constraints": [
        {"constraint_id": "C-001", "description": "Must rollback all writes if any step fails"}
      ],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        {"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "Order created in orders database"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-002", "description": "Inventory stock decremented and reserved updated"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-003", "description": "Payment record created with status 'charged'"}
      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001", "FR-002"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "CancelOrder",
      "purpose": "Execute the 'cancel' order workflow: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update order status",
      "behavior": "Lookup order, check status not shipped, refund payment, restore reserved inventory, update order status to cancelled; rollback on failure",
      "inputs": ["validated_data", "orders", "inventory"],
      "outputs": ["order_result"],
      "signature": "def CancelOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database, inventory: Database) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read_write", "description": "Read order status, update order status to cancelled"},
        {"variable": "inventory", "op": "read_write", "description": "Read reserved_count, restore stock_count, decrement reserved_count"},
        {"variable": "payments", "op": "read_write", "description": "Read payment record, update payment status to refunded"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "orders", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Read order, update status"},
        {"source_name": "inventory", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Read reserved, restore stock, decrement reserved"},
        {"source_name": "payments", "operation_type": "read_write", "description": "Read payment, update status to refunded"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["database.read_write", "payment.refund"],
      "constraints": [
        {"constraint_id": "C-002", "description": "Must not cancel shipped orders"},
        {"constraint_id": "C-003", "description": "Must rollback all writes if any step fails"}
      ],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        {"ac_id": "AC-004", "description": "Order status updated to cancelled"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-005", "description": "Inventory stock restored and reserved decremented"},
        {"ac_id": "AC-006", "description": "Payment status updated to refunded"}
      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001", "FR-003"]},
      "node_type": "atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "TrackOrder",
      "purpose": "Execute the 'track' order workflow: return current order status and estimated delivery time",
      "behavior": "Lookup order by order_id, retrieve status and estimated delivery, return result",
      "inputs": ["validated_data", "orders"],
      "outputs": ["order_result"],
      "signature": "def TrackOrder(validated_data: dict, orders: Database) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [
        {"variable": "orders", "op": "read", "description": "Read order status and delivery info"}
      ],
      "data_operations": [
        {"source_name": "orders", "operation_type": "read", "description": "Read order record"}
      ],
      "requested_capabilities": ["database.read"],
      "constraints": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        {"ac_id": "AC-007", "description": "Returns order status and estimated delivery time"}
      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001", "FR-004"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    },
    {
      "name": "FormatResult",
      "purpose": "Format the operation result into the standard output JSON structure",
      "behavior": "Take success, order_id, status, message from child operation and construct final output dict",
      "inputs": ["operation_result"],
      "outputs": ["order_result"],
      "signature": "def FormatResult(operation_result: dict) -> dict",
      "global_vars": [],
      "data_operations": [],
      "requested_capabilities": [],
      "constraints": [],
      "acceptance_criteria": [
        {"ac_id": "AC-008", "description": "Output conforms to expected JSON schema"}
      ],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "governance_notes": "Parent global_vars orders, inventory, payments are all read_write. ParseCommand, ValidateOrderData, and FormatResult are pure functions with no data store access. PlaceOrder and CancelOrder each cover read_write on all three stores. TrackOrder covers read on orders only. The union of child global_vars covers all parent required operations: orders read_write (PlaceOrder, CancelOrder, TrackOrder), inventory read_write (PlaceOrder, CancelOrder), payments read_write (PlaceOrder, CancelOrder). No parent operation is dropped."
}
